text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide takes first place! The<n>champion of
this year's Kikuka Sho is<n>Biwa Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes! My calculations were right!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

Biwa Hayahide sure is amazing!<n>She's a totally
different runner than<n>she was before summer!
Even her<n>physique looks a little different.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She must have trained a lot. There's<n>no doubt
she's the strongest BNW<n>member!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! I looooost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But that was an amazing race... I have<n>no regrets!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hayahide! I'm gonna get evenstronger until our next race! Wehave to race again!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket... Yes, absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: We must run together once more—all<n>three of us.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you can see... that I'm not<n>okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Haha... I'm pathetic.

I help her stand once she manages to<n>stagger up,
and we make it back to<n>the waiting room.
Sorry for... you know, ruining<n>everything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Come on. You and I both know I did.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
When I saw how Hayahide and<n>Ticket were
getting stronger and<n>stronger, I panicked and got
reckless<n>and messed up all your plans.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And look at what happened.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No wonder everyone looks down on<n>me. I'm just
a tiny weakling...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I KNOW!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Okay? I know the others at school<n>believe in me
and there are people<n>cheering for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: They've always believed in me—in<n>what I can do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I've always known that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I get it... That's not what I mean<n>though... It's me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The one who doesn't believe in me,<n>who calls me
short, spineless, and<n>messed up—who thinks I'm
completely worthless...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's always been me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...This was all pointless.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who doesn't believe in<n>myself. So
running to show other<n>people that there's more to
me than<n>what they see... It was all for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Look, I'm sorry. I'm just tired.
I need a break from training... and<n>from racing.
